label: Strategy Classification
description: Categorization of an entity's business strategy

label: Viability Prediction
description: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or market trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
description: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
description: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, fitness, or competitive positioning

label: Benchmark Result
description: Quantitative comparison against peers or industry standards

label: Framework Factor
description: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
description: Quantitative market statistic such as revenue, share, or growth rate

label: Expert Opinion
description: Qualitative professional judgment or analytical finding

label: Industry Analysis
description: Systematic analysis of industry structure, dynamics, and competitive forces

label: Competitive Profiling
description: Detailed comparison of competing entities' strategies, products, and positions

label: Benchmarking
description: Comparison against industry standards, peers, or prior periods

label: Field Research
description: Primary data collection via IS executive interviews or customer surveys

label: Document Review
description: Analysis of existing documents, reports, and published records

label: Statistical Analysis
description: Quantitative data analysis with statistical methods

label: High Confidence
description: Strong evidentiary basis; multiple corroborating sources or explicit supplier data

label: Medium Confidence
description: Reasonable basis but data is estimated or partially corroborated

label: Low Confidence
description: Directional judgment with limited evidence; Aberdeen estimate only

label: Verified
description: Confirmed by subsequent events, independent sources, or official records

label: Emerging
description: Technology newly introduced or gaining initial adoption at study time

label: Mature
description: Technology widely adopted and stable at study time

label: Declining
description: Technology losing market position or being superseded at study time

label: Obsolete
description: Technology no longer in production use

label: Active
description: Technology currently in active production use and development

label: Legacy Supported
description: Technology no longer actively developed but still maintained for existing installations

label: Revenue Benchmarking
description: Measurement and comparison of entity revenues against market total and peers; core methodology of Aberdeen's annual RISC/Unix survey

label: Market Share Analysis
description: Calculation of entity revenue as percentage of total market revenue

label: Growth Rate Analysis
description: Year-over-year percentage change in revenue or units; used for comparison across platform categories
